file_name: Questionnaire - Dubai Aerospace Enterprise - Macquarie AirFinance.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition. Are DAE and Macquarie AirFinance close competitors and what alternatives are available?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with DAE and/or Macquarie AirFinance.
